main.description: Aggregate (anonymous) vote result for a single subject in a single round. Individual ballots are never published.

subject.description: AT-URI of the site.eptss.subject record this result is for.

average.description: Mean vote score on the scale defined by scaleMin/scaleMax.

count.description: Number of votes cast for this song in this round.

scaleMin.description: Lowest possible vote value on this round's scale (e.g. 1).

scaleMax.description: Highest possible vote value on this round's scale (e.g. 5). Length of distribution is (scaleMax - scaleMin + 1).

distribution.description: Vote count per bucket on the [scaleMin, scaleMax] inclusive range. distribution[0] = count of scaleMin votes; distribution[length-1] = count of scaleMax votes.

publishedAt.description: When this aggregate was finalized and published. Conventionally the round's coveringBegins (the moment voting closed).
